title: Cohesin Loading Mode Ablation
anderson_key_finding: ~75% of cohesin is engaged in genome-wide extrusion; focal loading at enhancers inhibits transcription

mode_A_genome_wide.description: Uniform background + Gaussian enhancer peaks (ARCHCODE default)

mode_B_focal.description: Near-zero background + sharp enhancer peaks only

conclusion: Genome-wide loading (r=0.547) outperforms focal loading (r=0.542) by Δr=0.0048, consistent with Anderson et al. 2026.
